title: Apply Now for Junior Advisor Roles in Copenhagen – with Rasmussen Global 2026 Internship Program
summary: Are you an ambitious student or recent graduate passionate about international affairs, geopolitics, public policy, and strategic communications ? Here s your chance to join one of Europe s leading geopolitical advisory firms, Rasmussen Global , as a Junior Advisor Intern for the 2026 Fall Internship Program a career-defining opportunity to work at the nexus of policy, politics, and business. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(119); }); What Is the Rasmussen Global Internship? Rasmussen Global s 2026 Junior Advisor Internship offers hands-on, professional experience working closely with expert advisers across global capitals, including Copenhagen, Brussels, and beyond. Interns support client work involving international politics, global security, open market advocacy, and strategic policy initiatives all while gaining unmatched exposure to decision-makers and leading industry experts. This internship is ideal for individuals who want to: Build expertise in international relations and geopolitics Gain real-world consulting and advisory experience Work in a dynamic, multicultural professional environment Contribute to shaping narratives on democracy, security, and global policy ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(127); }); What You ll Do: Junior Advisor Responsibilities As a Junior Advisor Intern , you will be expected to: ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(128); }); Assist with research and policy analysis on geopolitical topics Draft clear written reports, briefings, and client documents Support senior advisors during strategic planning and outreach Engage with political, business, and media stakeholders Contribute to real, client-facing work that informs decision-making This internship is both challenging and rewarding , requiring initiative, responsiveness, and professionalism . ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(129); }); Top Benefits of the Internship While specific benefits are usually shared once offers are made, interns historically enjoy: 1.Professional Growth Work with senior experts and former policymakers Gain insights into international consulting and advisory services Build a global professional network 2.International Exposure Multi-location experience (primarily in Copenhagen) Cross-cultural teamwork and global policy engagement ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(130); }); 3. Career Advantages A standout addition to any CV/portfolio Real world experience in geopolitics and strategy consulting Note: Compensation, travel support, or housing arrangements vary and are typically communicated at the offer stage. Where This Opportunity Is Based Primary Location: Copenhagen, Denmark Secondary collaboration may involve offices and partners in Brussels, Berlin, Madrid, Kyiv, and other global hubs. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(131); }); Who Should Apply? Qualifications Eligibility This internship is competitive and structured for proactive learners who bring both academic foundation and drive . Ideal Candidate Profile: 1. Current bachelor s or master s student (final year preferred) 2. Studying Political Science, International Relations, Economics, Public Policy, Security Studies, or related fields 3. Strong analytical and communication skills (written + spoken) 4. Proactive, reliable, and capable of working with teams across time zones 5. Interest in geopolitics, international affairs, and cross-sector strategy While Rasmussen Global does not publicly list strict academic thresholds, relevant coursework and demonstrable leadership will make applicants stand out. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(132); }); How to Apply Official Links Steps To apply for this prestigious program, follow these steps: Prepare Your Application Materials Updated CV / Resume Motivational cover letter (focused on international affairs goals) Relevant academic transcripts Submit Through Official Channels While Rasmussen s LinkedIn post invites applications, the firm typically hosts application portals or contact emails. If contact emails are shared in future announcements (e.g. office emails for Copenhagen recruitment), be sure to follow those instructions precisely. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(133); }); Follow Up If you don t hear back within 2 3 weeks, follow up politely to confirm receipt. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(134); }); Because official applications are not always hosted publicly on LinkedIn, bookmarking the company s career page and professional site strongly increases your visibility. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(135); }); Apply here Key Deadlines Application Timeline Program Start: Fall 2026 (Exact start dates typically in September/October) Application Deadline: Not officially fixed publicly yet Rasmussen Global typically reviews applications on a rolling basis, so apply early to maximize your chances . ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(136); }); Tip: Early applications are hugely advantageous firms with rolling deadlines may close positions once they are filled. Insider Tips Boost Your Odds of Winning an Internship Apply well before the end of the submission period Emphasize global experience, research, language skills, and international perspectives Tailor your cover letter to why you specifically want to work at Rasmussen Global Highlight teamwork and analytical skills The Rasmussen Global Junior Advisor Internship 2026 Cohort is a high-impact international opportunity for students and future leaders seeking to launch careers in global affairs consultancy and strategic policy work. Early applications, persuasive materials, and global curiosity are your keys to success. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(137); }); For more information visit here For more global opportunities click here The post Apply Now for Junior Advisor Roles in Copenhagen with Rasmussen Global 2026 Internship Program appeared first on Opportunities for Youth .
